query:
SELECT 
  groupCode,
  COUNT(*) as memberCount,
  GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(fullName, ' (', team, ')') ORDER BY groupRole DESC, fullName SEPARATOR ' | ') as members,
  SUM(CASE WHEN groupRole = 'creator' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as creatorCount
FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE groupCode IS NOT NULL AND groupCode != ''
GROUP BY groupCode
ORDER BY memberCount DESC, groupCode;
